findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "getMyWly.

findings.name: getRosterInsight
findings.description: Analyze roster risks and get start/sit recommendations. Requires Field Level tier or higher. Provide a league ID for position-specific analysis. User identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getIdentityConflicts
findings.description: Fetch platform players that are missing canonical identity mapping. Admin tool for data integrity. Returns suspects from roster_players with no universal_player_id.

findings.name: resolveIdentityConflict
findings.description: Resolve a canonical identity conflict by adding an exclusion or flagging for manual review. FORCE_CREATE is prohibited — canonical creation is provider-only.

findings.name: getMyLeagues
findings.description: Get all your connected fantasy leagues across all platforms (Sleeper, ESPN, Yahoo). Returns league names, sport, scoring format, your record, and standings position. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyRoster
findings.description: Get your current fantasy roster with player names, positions, status (starter/bench/IR), injury status, and bye weeks. If leagueId is omitted, returns rosters for ALL your leagues. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyMatchup
findings.description: Get your current matchup: your team vs opponent with projected scores, player-by-player projections, and win probability. "How am I looking this week?" Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyStartSit
findings.description: Get personalized start/sit recommendations for your fantasy lineup. Analyzes your roster and recommends optimal starters by position. Zero LLM cost — pure data path. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyTradeTargets
findings.description: Analyze your roster for weaknesses and identify trade targets on other teams. Returns suggested trades with value fairness estimates. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyWaiverRecommendations
findings.description: Get waiver wire pickup recommendations based on your roster needs. Identifies weak spots and cross-references available players. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyWeeklyBrief
findings.description: Comprehensive weekly briefing: injury updates, matchup preview, lineup recommendations, waiver suggestions, and news alerts for your players. The flagship personalized tool. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyLeagueStandings
findings.description: Full league standings with your position highlighted. Includes record, points for/against, and luck factor. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyTradeHistory
findings.description: View your trade history: who you traded, when, and trade values at time of trade vs current value. Did you win or lose the trade? Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMySeasonOutlook
findings.description: Big-picture season analysis: current standing, roster strengths/weaknesses, schedule difficulty remaining, and championship probability. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyDraftBoard
findings.description: Personalized draft board based on your league settings (PPR/half/standard), league size, roster requirements, and draft position. Tiered rankings by position with reach/value indicators. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyDraftPick
findings.description: "Who should I draft RIGHT NOW?" Real-time draft assistance factoring in roster needs, positional scarcity, and value over replacement. Returns top 3 recommendations with reasoning. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyDraftStrategy
findings.description: Pre-draft strategy based on your draft position and league settings. Recommends strategy (Hero RB, Zero RB, Robust RB, etc.), target rounds by position, and players to target or avoid. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyAuctionValues
findings.description: Personalized auction dollar values adjusted for your league size, scoring format, and roster construction. Includes budget allocation strategy and nomination tips. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getMyDynastyRankings
findings.description: Dynasty-specific rankings factoring in age, future value, and contract. Buy-low/sell-high targets and rookie rankings for your league. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: runAdvancedAnalysis
findings.description: Run advanced analytics: VORP, Z-Score, consistency rating, schedule strength, ELO, or correlation analysis. Pure computation, zero LLM cost. Requires Field Level+ tier. User identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getGameDayIntelligence
findings.description: Game-day intelligence: weather impacts, injury reports, vegas lines, prop bets, historical matchup data, and ELO ratings. Pure data aggregation, zero LLM cost. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: runMonteCarlo
findings.description: Full Monte Carlo season/playoff simulation using your actual league data. Returns championship probability, playoff odds, expected wins, and key swing players. Requires Owner's Suite+ tier. Costs 3 tickets. User identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getDFSOptimalLineup
findings.description: Generate an optimal DFS lineup using constraint optimization. Returns optimal lineup with salary utilization, ceiling/floor projections, and correlation stacks. Requires Field Level+ tier. User identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getSurvivorPick
findings.description: Survivor pool recommendation: which team to pick this week, factoring in win probability and future value (saving strong teams for harder weeks). Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getPickEmRecommendations
findings.description: Pick'em and confidence pool picks: straight-up winners, spread picks, upset alerts, and confidence rankings. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getSharpMoney
findings.description: Line movement analysis: sharp vs public money splits, steam moves, and reverse line movement alerts. Requires Field Level+ tier. User identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatically.

findings.name: getPlayerDeepDive
findings.description: Comprehensive player analysis combining all sources: performance analytics, injury history, schedule analysis, dynasty value, ownership trends, betting props, and buy/sell/hold signal. The "tell me EVERYTHING" tool. Requires authentication — user identity is resolved from the OAuth token automatical

findings.name: getProjectionAccuracy
findings.description: View Chikoh projection accuracy & calibration data. Shows directional accuracy, MAE, RMSE, source weights, per-player hit rates, and improvement cycle metrics. Fully transparent — no auth required.

findings.name: get_signal_report
findings.description: Signal reliability rankings — shows which signals (weather, injury, coaching, defense, game_script, odds, usage, travel_rest, venue) contribute most to projection accuracy for a given sport/season. Sorted by average contribution. Requires Field Level+ tier.

findings.name: trivia_generate_round
findings.description: Generate a round of trivia questions on any topic. Returns questions with answer keys, difficulty labels, and time limits.

findings.name: trivia_grade_answer
findings.description: Grade a trivia answer using a 6-step fuzzy matching pipeline (exact, diacritics, variants, partial, spelling, LLM fallback). Returns correct/incorrect plus the matching method.

findings.name: trivia_create_game
findings.description: Create a new trivia game session with a unique room code. Returns the game ID and room code for players to join. Requires authentication so the game is owned by a real host.

findings.name: trivia_get_game_state
findings.description: Get the full state of a trivia game — status, room code, leaderboard, and team count.

findings.name: trivia_get_leaderboard
findings.description: Get the ranked leaderboard for a trivia game — teams sorted by total score with rank numbers.
